Mini Project 7: Animated Visuals and Map Plots

Shekhar Dash

April 28, 2026

data(gapminder) #DO NOT CHANGE
head(gapminder) #DO NOT CHANGE
## # A tibble: 6 × 6
##   country     continent  year lifeExp      pop gdpPercap
##   <fct>       <fct>     <int>   <dbl>    <int>     <dbl>
## 1 Afghanistan Asia       1952    28.8  8425333      779.
## 2 Afghanistan Asia       1957    30.3  9240934      821.
## 3 Afghanistan Asia       1962    32.0 10267083      853.
## 4 Afghanistan Asia       1967    34.0 11537966      836.
## 5 Afghanistan Asia       1972    36.1 13079460      740.
## 6 Afghanistan Asia       1977    38.4 14880372      786.
#

anim <- ggplot(gapminder, aes(x = lifeExp)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 10, color = "black", fill = "skyblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Life Expectancy in {closest_state}",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  ) +
  transition_states(year, transition_length = 1, state_length = 1)

anim

Line Plot Animated by Country

#
line_data <- gapminder %>%
  filter(country %in% c("Bangladesh", "United States", "China", "India", "Brazil")) %>%
  mutate(country = as.character(country))

anim_line <- ggplot(line_data, aes(x = year, y = lifeExp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Plot of Life Expectancy over Time for {closest_state}",
    x = "Year",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  ) +
  transition_states(
    states = country,
    transition_length = 5,
    state_length = 5
  )

anim_line

World Map Visual

#
library(tidyverse)
library(gapminder)
library(ggplot2)
library(maps)


gdp_change <- gapminder %>%
  filter(year %in% c(1952, 2007)) %>%
  select(country, year, gdpPercap) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = gdpPercap) %>%
  mutate(gdpPercapChange = `2007` - `1952`) %>%
  select(country, gdpPercapChange) %>%
  rename(region = country) %>%
  mutate(
    region = fct_recode(
      region,
      "USA" = "United States",
      "UK" = "United Kingdom",
      "Congo" = "Congo, Rep.",
      "Democratic Republic of the Congo" = "Congo, Dem. Rep.",
      "South Korea" = "Korea, Rep.",
      "North Korea" = "Korea, Dem. Rep.",
      "Slovakia" = "Slovak Republic",
      "Yemen" = "Yemen, Rep.",
      "West Bank" = "West Bank and Gaza",
      "Ivory Coast" = "Cote d'Ivoire"
    )
  )

world_map <- map_data("world")

map_plot_data <- world_map %>%
  left_join(gdp_change, by = "region")

ggplot(map_plot_data, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = gdpPercapChange)) +
  geom_polygon(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  coord_quickmap() +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "Spectral",
    direction = 1,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "GDP per Capita Change"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Change in GDP Per Capita Between 1952 and 2007",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
